params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 54, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Medium
- Hard
- Elite', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}		 {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 55, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Medium
- Hard
- Elite', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

Immunities - Poison, Venom

params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Expert Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 56, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

Immunities - Poison, Venom

params {'1306': 243, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Theatre', '1309': 'Complete the Theatre of Blood without anyone dying through any means and whilst everyone in the team completes the following Combat Achievement tasks in a single run: \'Perfect Maiden\', \'Perfect Bloat\', \'Perfect Nylocas\', \'Perfect Sotetseg\', \'Perfect Xarpus\' and \'Perfect Verzik\'.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 51} {'1306': 243, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Theatre', '1309': 'Complete the Theatre of Blood without anyone dying through any means and whilst everyone in the team completes the following Combat Achievement tasks in a single run: \'Perfect Maiden\', \'Perfect Bloat\', \'Perfect Nylocas\', \'Perfect Sotetseg\', \'Perfect Xarpus\' and \'Perfect Verzik\'.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 52}

params {'1313': 'Chambers of Xeric', '1314': 1043, '1315': 12, '1316': 942, '1317': 20205045, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Chambers of Xeric is a large cave system found underneath Mount Quidamortem in the Kebos Lowlands.

The Chambers of Xeric will scale to the number of players (1-100) and their stats.

The Chambers of Xeric has a challenge mode difficulty setting for more experienced raiders.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'There are no mandatory requirements to enter the Chambers of Xeric.

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 32523, '1323': 7336, '1324': 100, '1325': 400, '1326': 160, '1327': 233, '1328': 0, '1329': 4300}		 {'1313': 'Chambers of Xeric', '1314': 1043, '1315': 13, '1316': 942, '1317': 20205045, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Chambers of Xeric is a large cave system found underneath Mount Quidamortem in the Kebos Lowlands.

The Chambers of Xeric will scale to the number of players (1-100) and their stats.

The Chambers of Xeric has a challenge mode difficulty setting for more experienced raiders.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'There are no mandatory requirements to enter the Chambers of Xeric.

params {'1313': 'Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode', '1314': 1520, '1315': 52, '1317': 60247187, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Hard mode is a more challenging experience than the regular raid. Mechanics are harder and more punishing.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Access to Morytania
- At least one regular Theatre of Blood completion

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Master

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Entry mode is an easier version of the Theatre of Blood aimed at introducing you to the content and the boss mechanics in a less punishing way.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Access to Morytania

params {'1313': 'Hespori', '1314': 284, '1315': 28, '1317': 20440935, '1319': 'The Hespori is a rare carnivorous plant that becomes conscious and highly aggressive once fully grown.

In order to fight it, a Hespori seed must be planted and fully grown in the Hespori patch within the west wing of the Farming Guild.

Attack Styles - Ranged, Magic
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- 65 Farming

3580(1)
params {'1313': 'The Mimic', '1314': 186, '1315': 36, '1317': 295390706, '1319': 'The Mimic is a boss occasionally found disguised as either Elite or Master clue scroll reward caskets.

Mimics can only be found after speaking to the strange casket upstairs in Watson's house in Great Kourend.

params {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 57, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

TzHaar-Ket-Rak offers a number of challenges where those who have proven themselves within the Fight Caves or the Inferno can go up against an ever increasing number of JalTok-Jads.', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's First and Second Challenges
- 1 Fight Caves completion

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Third to Sixth Challenges
- 1 Inferno completion

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 41571, '1323': 8859, '1324': 20, '1325': 230, '1326': 100, '1327': 150, '1328': 0, '1329': 2000}		 {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 58, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

params {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 55} {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 56}

params {'1306': 435, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Apmeken', '1309': 'Complete the Apmeken room in a group of two or more, without anyone allowing any dangers to trigger, standing in venom or being hit by a volatile baboon. 4408(1)
params {'1306': 436, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Ba-Ba', '1309': 'Defeat Ba-Ba in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Ba-Ba's Attacks off-prayer, Ba-Ba's slam, rolling boulders, rubble attack or falling rocks. Hits for zero damage still count. No sarcophagi may be opened. You must have all Ba-Ba invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 55} {'1306': 436, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Ba-Ba', '1309': 'Defeat Ba-Ba in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Ba-Ba's Attacks off-prayer, Ba-Ba's slam, rolling boulders, rubble attack or falling rocks. Hits for zero damage still count. No sarcophagi may be opened. You must have all Ba-Ba invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 56}
